hero_subtitle: Merge, split, compress, convert — do everything with your PDFs. All processing happens in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
tools_subtitle: Everything you need to work with PDF files, completely free and 100% private.

features_lightning_fast_desc: Process files in seconds with our optimized engine
features_secure_desc: Files processed locally, never uploaded to servers
features_works_anywhere_desc: Use on any device, any browser, anytime
cta_subtitle: If there's a PDF feature you need that's missing, I'd love to build it for you. Request new tools and features at
footer_tagline: Free online PDF tools for everyone. Process files securely in your browser — your files never leave your device.
tool_duplicate_pages_desc: Copy pages within the same PDF
faq_what_is_a: PDFEditMobile is a free online tool that lets you work with PDF files directly in your browser. You can merge, split, compress, convert, rotate, and edit PDFs without uploading them to any server. All processing happens locally on your device for maximum privacy and speed.
faq_free_a: Yes, PDFEditMobile is completely free to use with no hidden costs. All features are available at no charge. We sustain the service through non-intrusive advertising. There are no premium tiers, file limits, or watermarks on your documents.
faq_account_q: Do I need to create an account?
faq_account_a: No account is required to use any of our PDF tools. You can optionally sign in with Google to keep a history of your actions across sessions, but this is completely optional. All core features work without signing in.
faq_file_size_q: What file size limits are there?
faq_file_size_a: Since all processing happens in your browser, file limits depend on your device's available memory. Most modern devices can handle files up to 100MB without issues. For very large files (100MB+), performance may vary based on your device.
faq_browsers_a: PDFEditMobile works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience. Mobile browsers are also fully supported.
faq_uploaded_q: Are my files uploaded to your servers?
faq_uploaded_a: No, your files are NEVER uploaded to our servers. All PDF processing happens entirely in your web browser using JavaScript. This means your sensitive documents never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy and security.
faq_sensitive_q: Is PDFEditMobile safe to use for sensitive documents?
faq_sensitive_a: Yes, PDFEditMobile is extremely safe for sensitive documents. Since we process everything locally in your browser, confidential information like contracts, financial documents, or personal records never leave your computer. Your data stays on your device.
faq_after_processing_q: What happens to my files after processing?
faq_after_processing_a: Your files exist only in your browser's memory while you're using the tool. When you close the tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store, cache, or have any access to your documents.
faq_cookies_a: We use minimal cookies for essential functionality (like remembering theme preferences) and analytics to improve our service. We also use Google AdSense cookies for advertising. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
faq_merge_q: How do I merge multiple PDFs?
faq_merge_a: Go to the Merge PDF tool, drag and drop your PDF files or click to browse and select them. You can reorder files by dragging them into your preferred order. You can also expand each file to see pages, rotate or remove specific pages. When ready, click 'Merge & Download' to combine them into a single PDF.
faq_split_q: How do I split a PDF into multiple files?
faq_split_a: Use the Split PDF tool. Upload your PDF, then choose how to split: by specific page ranges (e.g., '1-5, 8-10'), extract all pages as separate files, or select specific pages visually. Click 'Split PDF' to process and download your split files.
faq_compress_a: Our compression tool optimizes your PDF by removing redundant data, optimizing images, and streamlining the file structure. The compression maintains document quality while reducing file size, typically achieving 30-70% size reduction depending on the original file's content.
faq_ocr_q: Can I convert scanned PDFs to editable text?
faq_ocr_a: Yes! Our OCR (Optical Character Recognition) tool can extract text from scanned documents and image-based PDFs. Upload your scanned PDF, and our tool will process it to extract readable, searchable text. The accuracy depends on the scan quality.
faq_password_q: How do I add a password to my PDF?
faq_password_a: Use the Protect PDF tool. Upload your PDF, enter your desired password, and optionally set permissions (like preventing printing or copying). The tool will encrypt your PDF with industry-standard AES encryption.
faq_image_formats_q: What image formats can I convert to PDF?
faq_image_formats_a: Our JPG to PDF tool supports JPG, JPEG, PNG, and other common image formats. You can upload multiple images and combine them into a single PDF, or convert each image to its own PDF file.
faq_slow_q: Why is processing taking a long time?
faq_slow_a: Processing time depends on your file size and your device's capabilities. Large PDFs with many pages or high-resolution images take longer. If processing seems stuck, try refreshing the page and using a smaller file, or try on a device with more RAM.
faq_cant_upload_q: Why can't I upload my PDF?
faq_cant_upload_a: Make sure your file has a .pdf extension and is a valid PDF document. Some PDFs may be corrupted or use unsupported features. If the file opens in other PDF readers, try saving it as a new PDF and uploading the new copy.
faq_output_looks_different_q: The output PDF looks different from the original
faq_output_looks_different_a: PDF processing can sometimes affect formatting, especially for complex documents with special fonts or interactive elements. For best results, use source PDFs that are print-ready. If you're having issues, try using a different tool or contact us.
faq_unlock_a: Our unlock tool can only remove restrictions (like no-printing) from PDFs. If the PDF requires a password to open (fully encrypted), you'll need to enter the correct password. We cannot bypass password protection without the password.
faq_download_a: Check if your browser is blocking downloads or pop-ups. Try using a different browser. If the issue persists, make sure you have enough disk space and try right-clicking the download button and selecting 'Save As'.
contact_response_q: How quickly will I get a response?
contact_response_a: I typically respond within 24-48 hours for email inquiries. For urgent matters, Twitter/X DMs usually get faster responses.
contact_feature_a: Absolutely! I love hearing feature suggestions. Send them via email or create an issue on GitHub.
contact_opensource_a: The core functionality uses open-source libraries. For full source access or collaboration opportunities, please reach out directly.

compress_desc: Reduce file size while optimizing for maximal PDF quality.
compress_optimize_hint: We'll optimize images and remove redundant data while keeping your content clear.
compress_level_rec_desc: Best balance between quality and size
compress_level_ext_desc: Maximum size reduction, lower image quality
compress_success_desc: Your optimized document is ready for download.
compress_local_hint: All processing happened locally in your browser. Your data never left your device.
compress_how_step1: Upload your PDF and wait for our local analyzer to generate a preview.
compress_how_step2: Choose your compression level: Recommended (balanced), Low (max quality), or Extreme (max compression).
compress_how_step3: Hit 'Compress' and download your optimized PDF instantly. All processing is 100% private.
compress_benefit1_desc: Your files never touch our servers. We value your privacy above all else.
compress_benefit2_desc: Reduce up to 90% of your file size by optimizing redundant structures and metadata.
compress_benefit3_desc: Our visual preview lets you verify the document looks perfect before you process it.
compress_benefit4_desc: Compressed files follow standard ISO protocols and work anywhere.
merge_desc: Combine multiple PDFs into one. Rearrange, rotate, or delete pages before merging.
merge_browse: or click to browse • Multiple files supported
merge_range_hint: Leave empty to include all pages
merge_all_removed: All files removed. Add more files or go back to upload.
merge_success_desc: Your merged PDF is ready for download.
merge_how_step1: Upload your PDF files by dragging and dropping them or clicking 'Upload PDFs'.
merge_how_step2: Arrange the files in your desired order. You can also rotate or remove specific pages.
merge_how_step3: Click 'Merge & Save PDF' to combine them into a single high-quality document.
merge_benefit1_desc: Your files never leave your browser. We don't upload or store your data on any server.
merge_benefit2_desc: Merge as many PDFs as you need. Our tool is free forever with no hidden costs.
merge_benefit3_desc: Our merging process maintains the original quality and formatting of your documents.
merge_benefit4_desc: Easily reorder, rotate, or delete individual pages before merging for perfect results.
unlock_desc: Remove password protection and restrictions from your PDF files instantly.
unlock_warning: PDFEditMobile will attempt to remove printing, copying, and standard owner restrictions. User passwords are required for full decryption of strongly encrypted files.
unlock_success_desc: Your PDF is now completely unlocked and ready.
unlock_how_step1: Upload your password-protected or restricted PDF document.
unlock_how_step2: Enter the document password if you know it. For restricted files, we can often bypass them without a password.
unlock_how_step3: PDFEditMobile will recreate the document without encryption. Download your fully accessible PDF instantly.
unlock_benefit1_desc: Easily remove printing, copying, and editing restrictions from any PDF.
unlock_benefit2_desc: All decryption happens right in your browser. Your sensitive files never leave your side.
unlock_benefit3_desc: Regain access to important documents across all your devices without hassle.
unlock_benefit4_desc: We ensure your document structure, images, and text remain 100% intact.
